steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the two works. Both are LED light sculptures by Grimanesa Amoros—this shared identity is the core connection to highlight.

steps.title: Match the similarity
steps.content:
Choice A uses the parallel structure “X is Y, as is Z” to assert that both works are LED light sculptures by the same artist.

The other choices either emphasize differences (B and D use “contrast” and “larger”) or fail to make a comparison at all (C addresses only one sculpture).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
